---
name: Safety review
about: Review privacy, legal, data, support, or owner-approval risk before production use
title: "[Safety] "
labels: safety-review, privacy-review, owner-approval
---

## Surface

- Route or workflow:
- Data involved:
- Owner action:

## Risk Class

- [ ] Personal data
- [ ] Access secret
- [ ] Payment or deposit
- [ ] Lease or legal terms
- [ ] Pricing or availability
- [ ] Urgent repair or safety issue
- [ ] Listing publication
- [ ] External integration

## Required Decision

What must a human owner or operator approve before this ships?

## Evidence

Link to public-safe screenshots, PRs, previews, or sanitized logs only.
